reference: Hello. Ideally, a colonoscopy should not cause any pain in the abdomen at all. Just to discuss: if the pain has started during or immediately after the colonoscopy, I can consider an injury to the colon causing an infection or an abscess. You need the attention of a doctor irrespective of your status.
text: Hello. Ideally, a colonoscopy should not cause any pain in the abdomen at all. Just to discuss if the pain has started during or immediately after the colonoscopy, I can consider an injury to the colon causing an infection or an abscess. You need the attention of a doctor respective of your status.
